ValidationRule.description: DR read only to partners when status=Rejected/Approved/Pending Sales Approval
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( AND( $Profile.Name = 'Reseller Community', OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Approved'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Rejected'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Pending Sales Approval') ) ),
AND( $Profile.Name = 'Reseller Community', ISCHANGED(Status__c), OR( TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Status__c)) = 'Approved', TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Status__c)) = 'Rejected', TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Status__c)) = 'Pending Sales Approval' ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to edit records when the Status is Approved/Rejected/Pending Sales Approval
